must_detect.matched_text:
Strictly Confidential — Not for SGXNet circulation; contains information not generally available under SFA/SGX.
Board update re Project Sandpiper: proposed acquisition by Harbor Quill Capital Pte. Ltd. of a 55.2% stake in Qilin Robotics Ltd. (SGX Mainboard).
Consideration: SGD 480,000,000 cash; draft Share Purchase Agreement (definitive agreement) and ancillary TSA/SSA attached for review.
Target signing 12 Sep 2026; public announcement embargo until 30 Sep 2026, 08:30 SGT, subject to pre-clearance with SGX RegCo.
We will request a trading halt; IR draft and Q&A prepared by Ms. Darya Ong (Head of IR) pending Chair review by Mr. Leon Tay.
MAC/MAE: for avoidance of doubt, the loss of the CoastalWorks POC and routine customer churn shall not constitute a Material Adverse Effect under Clause 7.2.
Conditions precedent: IMDA data-transfer notification (if applicable), no change-of-control consents outstanding beyond the Long-Stop Date (LSD), PDPA consents for employee data transfer in accordance with Section 13 PDPA.
Note: the 2024 sustainability metrics and basic revenue figures referenced are from Qilin Robotics’ publicly available annual report on SGXNet dated 24 Mar 2025.
Employment/PDPA: seconded staff lists include Dr. Sera Ng and Mr. Julian Koh; do not circulate personal emails or partial NRICs outside the clean team.
Contact channel for clean room queries: dealroom@amberwren-legal.sg (monitored by Amber Wren Legal LLC).
Financing: equity cheque from Harbor Quill Fund III (internal), plus a committed SGD 120,000,000 term facility at SORA+195 bps; no security over operating subsidiaries pre-completion.
Compliance: pursuant to SFA insider trading prohibitions and SGX LR 703, no director or employee is to trade in Qilin Robotics securities until the embargo lifts.
